# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Engine fixes and leak repair**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 brings upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and repairs a native resource leak in SKImage.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia m151 upstream bug fixes merged** — Cherry-picks Chrome m151 bug fixes from the Skia upstream into the bundled renderer, improving stability without changing the managed API surface. ([#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData** — The overload accepting an SKData and an SKRectI subset was not releasing the intermediate native image when the subset operation completed, causing a gradual native memory leak. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
